title: selaginella hochreutineri
intro: Selaginella hochreutineri, also known as Hochreutinera's spikemoss, is a species of plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family and is native to Brazil. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to exhibit antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial activities, making it useful in the treatment of various health conditions. The health benefits of Selaginella hochreutineri include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and protect against oxidative stress, among others. Selaginella hochreutineri is traditionally used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to treat various health issues, including respiratory problems, skin conditions, and gastrointestinal disorders.
